Thanks for opening a PR! A few quick things before you submit:

- Run `npm run build` locally so we know TypeScript and Vite are happy.
- For visual changes, attach before/after screenshots (desktop + mobile,
  light + dark if relevant). The app supports widths down to 320px.
-->

## Checklist

- [ ] `npm run build` passes locally
- [ ] Manually tested in the browser (desktop + mobile widths where relevant)
- [ ] No new outbound network calls, analytics, or tracking added
  (see [PRIVACY.md](../PRIVACY.md))
- [ ] Docs/README updated if behavior or structure changed
